sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2597" key="ai)olo/dwros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αἰολό-δωρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n2597.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bestowing various gifts</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1347.tlg001:19" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epimenid.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">19</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
